scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api,worker -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/worker"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/worker
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/worker
scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/worker
scripts.postinstall: npm run prisma:generate -w apps/api && npm run build -w packages/shared
